prompt_text:
### Demographics: 63-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 4 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after elevated fasting glucose on routine screening
Current symptoms: Rare nocturnal hypoglycemia (1 episode in 3 months); no DKA/HHS signs

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3b (30-44)
ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); Ischemic stroke or transient ischemic attack history
MASH
Body mass index category: Obese Class I
Diabetic retinopathy
Diabetic neuropathy
Diabetic Retinopathy
Diabetic Peripheral Neuropathy
Major Depressive Disorder
Rheumatoid Arthritis
Psychotic Disorder on Atypical Antipsychotics
Community-acquired pneumonia (resolved)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3b (30-44); HF (No); ASCVD: Coronary artery disease (History of PCI/stent); MASLD: MASH; BMI Category: Obese Class I
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (father)
- Social history: Never smoker; Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 500mg twice daily; Dulaglutide 1.5mg once weekly; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Quetiapine (150 mg nightly), Sertraline (50 mg daily), Methotrexate (15 mg weekly), Prednisone (5 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 94.4 kg; Height 181.4 cm; BMI 28.7 kg/m²; Blood pressure 131/76 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 7.9%; 9 months ago 7.6%; 6 months ago 7.7%; 3 months ago 7.2%; current 7.2%), FPG (12 months ago 162mg/dL; 9 months ago 176mg/dL; 6 months ago 179mg/dL; 3 months ago 144mg/dL; current 175mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 96.1kg; 9 months ago 95.8kg; 6 months ago 93.1kg; 3 months ago 93.1kg; current 94.4kg), Height (12 months ago 181.4cm; 9 months ago 181.4cm; 6 months ago 181.4cm; 3 months ago 181.4cm; current 181.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 29.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 28.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 28.0kg/m²; current 28.7kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 128mmHg; 9 months ago 131mmHg; 6 months ago 133mmHg; 3 months ago 129mmHg; current 131mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 79mmHg; 9 months ago 77mmHg; 6 months ago 79mmHg; 3 months ago 79mmHg; current 76mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 112U/L; 9 months ago 106U/L; 6 months ago 99U/L; 3 months ago 101U/L; current 109U/L), AST (12 months ago 88U/L; 9 months ago 83U/L; 6 months ago 78U/L; 3 months ago 81U/L; current 86U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 9 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 6 months ago 0.7mg/dL; 3 months ago 0.7mg/dL; current 0.7mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 42mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 38mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 37mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 39mL/min/1.73m²; current 38mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 112mg/g; 9 months ago 101mg/g; 6 months ago 69mg/g; 3 months ago 86mg/g; current 82mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 90mg/dL; 9 months ago 94mg/dL; 6 months ago 96mg/dL; 3 months ago 92mg/dL; current 93mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 53mg/dL; 9 months ago 54mg/dL; 6 months ago 56mg/dL; 3 months ago 54mg/dL; current 55mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 113mg/dL; 9 months ago 107mg/dL; 6 months ago 112mg/dL; 3 months ago 125mg/dL; current 119mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 10.0g/dL; 9 months ago 10.0g/dL; 6 months ago 10.2g/dL; 3 months ago 10.1g/dL; current 9.8g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide Not measured (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Moderate adherence (estimated 70-90%); SMBG 1-3 times/week; lifestyle control inconsistent.
Financial context: Patient has comprehensive insurance with minimal out-of-pocket burden and reports no financial barriers to clinically indicated therapies (budget ≤ KRW 1,000,000/month).
